description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs that all run in the default test stage. Define a hidden .common template that uses the before_script `pip install pytest wheel build` and then runs the script sequence: `python -m pip install -e .`, `python -m pytest -v . --junitxml=junit2html-job-${CI_JOB_NAME}.xml`, `python -m junit2htmlreport junit2html-job-${CI_JOB_NAME}.xml`, `python -m junit2htmlreport --report-matrix tests/matrix-example.html tests/junit-axis-linux.xml tests/junit-axis-solaris.xml tests/junit-axis-windows.xml`, `python -m junit2htmlreport --merge junit2html-merged-example.xml tests/junit-unicode.xml tests/junit-unicode2.xml tests/junit-cute2.xml`, `python -m junit2htmlreport junit2html-merged-example.xml`, `python -m build -w`, and `python -m junit2htmlreport --summary-matrix - < junit2html-job-${CI_JOB_NAME}.xml`. Add a job `python-3.13` that extends .common and uses the docker image python:3.13, and a job `python-3.8` that extends .common with image python:3.8, both inheriting the full script and publishing artifacts of paths `junit2html*.xml*`, `tests/*.html`, `dist/*.whl` and a JUnit report matching `junit2html-job-*.xml`. Add a separate job `coverage-3.13` in the test stage using image python:3.13 that runs `pip install pytest pytest-cov`, `pip install -e .`, and `python3 -m pytest --cov-fail-under=87 --cov=junit2htmlreport .` without additional artifacts.
